summary: Diagnosed CSV vs display mismatch: CSV uses column names like tunjangan_keluarga, fungsional_profesi, jkn_maret_2026, umumapril_2026 which were not mapped during import. Added PayrollCsvMapper, fixed import mapping, new DB columns (tunj_masa_kerja, tunj_kehadiran, tunj_makan, jkn_label, umum_label), payroll:reprocess-from-raw command, shared slip structure matching user's 4-section format, and CSV verification table on show page.
current_status: Payroll import mapping fixed. Slip show/print now displays all components per official structure. Show page has Verifikasi CSV vs Database table. Run php artisan payroll:reprocess-from-raw to backfill existing imports. Salary 274 reprocessed successfully.
